title: hieracium juranum subsp. doronicoides
intro: Hieracium juranum subsp. doronicoides, a lesser-known species of the Hieracium genus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Hieracium juranum subsp. doronicoides include its ability to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as bloating and constipation, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to support overall well-being and treat specific health conditions.
